name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
LOULOU PUFFER Quilted Calfskin Bag, made of 100% calf leather with a soft and delicate touch, like holding a cloud ☁️; adorned with YSL metal logo, matte finish, and unique silver brushed metal hardware; satin lining with magnetic closure and a zippered interior pocket.
Shoulder strap length: 52cm (28cm when folded)
Dimensions: 29x17x11cm
Model: 577476
